title: Target reconnaissance and asset discovery
description: Enumerate all in-scope assets: subdomains, IPs, APIs, mobile apps, and cloud infrastructure.
acceptance_criteria: All subdomains in scope enumerated
IPs and ASNs mapped to target organization
APIs and mobile app endpoints identified
Program scope boundaries confirmed
High-value targets prioritized by bounty table

title: Web application vulnerability testing
description: Test in-scope web applications for high-severity bugs: XSS, SQLi, SSRF, auth bypass, business logic.
acceptance_criteria: Authentication and authorization tested
All user-input parameters tested for injection
SSRF opportunities tested on URL parameters
Business logic flows tested for abuse
IDOR tested on resource identifiers

title: API security testing
description: Test API endpoints for BOLA, BFLA, improper authentication, and sensitive data exposure.
acceptance_criteria: BOLA tested on all object ID endpoints
BFLA tested by accessing privileged functions with low-privilege tokens
JWT/OAuth vulnerabilities tested
Excessive data exposure tested in API responses

title: Develop proof of concept for confirmed findings
description: For each valid finding, create a minimal, reliable PoC that demonstrates impact without causing damage.
acceptance_criteria: PoC developed for each confirmed finding
PoC demonstrates impact clearly without being destructive
Reproduction steps documented in detail
CVSS score calculated and justified

title: Write HackerOne and Bugcrowd reports
description: Write platform-compliant bug bounty reports for each confirmed finding, ready for submission.
acceptance_criteria: HackerOne markdown report generated per finding
Bugcrowd CSV generated for bulk submission
All findings include: title, severity, CVSS, steps to reproduce, impact, PoC, remediation
Reports reviewed for clarity and completeness
